title: data-us pack=screener-batch output
description: Pack output for `data-us/scripts/pack.py --tickers T1,T2,... --pack screener-batch`. Batch only (≥2 tickers required). Filters yfinance info to a lightweight screener-input field set: trailingPE, priceToBook, marketCap, dividendYield, beta, fiftyTwoWeekHigh, fiftyTwoWeekLow, regularMarketPrice, sector, industry, shortName. Tier 2 (yfinance unofficial).

tickers.description: Map of upper-case ticker → screener-input fields. Empty `{}` when batch fetch failed entirely (top-level `error` then carries the client error blob).

additionalProperties.description: Per-ticker screener slice. Missing fields surface as null (not omitted).

dividendYield.description: Yahoo dividendYield is a percentage (e.g. 0.38 = 0.38%) — NOT a decimal fraction.

error.description: Top-level client error blob when batch fetch failed entirely. `tickers` will be `{}` in that case.
